descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in Centennial Cup semi-final to advance to championship match.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a Centennial Cup junior-A semi-final on Thursday night in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. The British Columbia team, advancing from a 2-1 round-robin record, will face the Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos in the sudden-death final Saturday night. Goals were scored by Trevor Dickie, Steve Jaques, Matt Hervey, Brian Kozak, Paul Rutherford, and Jason Phillips.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes Advance to Centennial Cup Final
